calendar.matters:
Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:11 am and conlcuding at 9:19 am.

Plaintiff Savings Deposit Insurance Company is represented by Gabriel G Gregg, Esq.
Defendant Bahattin Uzan not appearing.

Akin Alcitepe is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies via Zoom video Conference.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Savings Deposit Insurance Company, and against Defendant Bahattin Uzan, as follows:

1. Damages: $1,939,642.58
2. Prejudgment Interest: $4,043,321.64
3. Costs: $435.00
4. Attorney fees: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $5,983,399.22

Proposed judgment signed and filed.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Instructing Clerk To Accept Plaintiffs Request For Entry Of Default Against Defendant
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Gabriel Gregg , Esq., RIMON, P.C. 650.461.4433 gabriel.gregg@rimonlaw.com Attorneys for Plaintiff SAVINGS DEPOSIT INSURANCE FUND
No other appearances

Hearing is held. Argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SAVINGS DEPOSIT INSURANCE FUND , A PUBLIC ENTITY OF THE REPUBLIC OF TURKEY's Motion For Order Instructing Clerk To Accept Plaintiff's Request For Entry Of Default Against Defendant. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)
